summary: Frontend-only testing of redesigned Shop and Services pages. Both pages display world-class, emotionally resonant experiences with gradient backgrounds, animated elements, trust badges, social proof on cards, and full mobile responsiveness. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ShopPage.jsx (702 lines) - Well-structured with clear component separation
ServicesPage.jsx (654 lines) - Clean implementation with proper data-testid attributes
Both pages correctly implement 'For You' as first pillar and 'All' as last pillar
Social proof implemented on all cards (X bought this / Booked by X pets this month)
Trust badges visible in hero sections (Same-day delivery, Quality guaranteed, Verified Providers)
Animated pulse effects on hero backgrounds and badges
Gradient text styling on hero titles
Emotional close sections with 'Ask Mira' links
test_credentials: N/A - No login required for these pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop and Services pages fully redesigned and tested. All features working: hero sections with trust badges, pillar filters with subcategories, search functionality, product/service cards with social proof, mobile responsiveness (2-column products, 1-column services on mobile).

features_tested.shop_page_loads: PASS - Page loads with hero, filters, and product cards
features_tested.shop_hero_section: PASS - Gradient background, Pet Soul Member badge, trust badges (Same-day delivery, 15,432 happy pets, Quality guaranteed)
features_tested.shop_pillar_filters: PASS - 10 pillars: For You (first), Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, Enjoy, Fit, Learn, All (last)
features_tested.shop_pillar_subcategories: PASS - Celebrate shows: Cakes, Mini Cakes, Dognuts, Hampers; Dine shows: Fresh Meals, Treats, Desi Treats, Frozen
features_tested.shop_search_functionality: PASS - Search shows dropdown with product image, name, price
features_tested.shop_product_cards: PASS - Shows image, name, price, social proof (X bought this)
features_tested.shop_mobile_responsive: PASS - 2-column grid, cards 177px wide, filters horizontally scrollable
features_tested.services_page_loads: PASS - Page loads with hero, filters, and 200 service cards
features_tested.services_hero_section: PASS - Gradient background, Pet Soul Member badge, trust badges (Verified Providers, 12,847 happy pets, Quality Guaranteed)
features_tested.services_pillar_filters: PASS - 10 pillars: For You (first), Care, Learn, Stay, Fit, Travel, Celebrate, Advisory, Emergency, All (last)
features_tested.services_pillar_subcategories: PASS - Care shows: Grooming, Spa, Vet Visits, Walking, Pet Sitting; Learn shows: Puppy Training, Obedience, Behaviour, Agility
features_tested.services_search_functionality: PASS - Search filters services within selected pillar
features_tested.services_cards: PASS - Shows name, relevance text, price/Get Quote, social proof (Booked by X pets this month)
features_tested.services_mobile_responsive: PASS - 1-column grid, cards 366px wide (full width), filters horizontally scrollable
features_tested.emotional_close_sections: PASS - Both pages have emotional close with 'Ask Mira' link

design_review.visual_polish: PASS - Gradient backgrounds, animated pulse effects, smooth hover transitions
design_review.contrast: PASS - White text on dark gradient backgrounds, good readability
design_review.spacing: PASS - Proper padding and margins on all elements
design_review.mobile_layout: PASS - Cards stack properly, filters scroll horizontally
